content: [{"title":"Add blog listing page","description":"Create a blog listing page with three placeholder posts.","atomType":"structure","filesTouch":["blog.html"],"estimatedLines":90,"visibleChange":"A blog listing page appears with three placeholder posts.","dependencies":[]},{"title":"Add blog post detail page","description":"Create a blog post detail page with placeholder content and a back link.","atomType":"structure","filesTouch":["post.html"],"estimatedLines":95,"visibleChange":"A blog post detail page is available with placeholder content.","dependencies":["Add blog listing page"]},{"title":"Add category filter UI","description":"Add category tags and a filter UI to the blog listing.","atomType":"behavior","filesTouch":["blog.html","main.js"],"estimatedLines":70,"visibleChange":"Blog posts can be filtered by category tags.","dependencies":["Add blog listing page"]},{"title":"Add RSS feed output","description":"Generate an RSS feed for the latest posts.","atomType":"integration","filesTouch":["rss.xml"],"estimatedLines":60,"visibleChange":"An RSS feed is generated for the blog.","dependencies":["Add blog listing page"]}]
